overview.short: The Sri Varadharaja Perumal Temple in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu, India is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu.
overview.description: The Sri Varadharaja Perumal Temple in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu, India is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu. It is on the banks of the Thamirabarani River.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pachaiyar River
topPlaces.description: The Pachaiyar River originates on the eastern slopes of the Western Ghats approximately 1,000 metres (3,300 ft) above sea level in the state of Tamil Nadu in southern India. It then converges with the Tambaraparani River.

topPlaces.name: Mela Thiruvenkatanathapuram
topPlaces.description: Mela Thiruvenkatanathapuram also known as Thirunankovil is a hamlet situated on the bank of river Thamirabarani. It is about 10 km from Tirunelveli, a district headquarters in Tamil Nadu, South India.

topPlaces.name: Melapalayam
topPlaces.description: Melapalayam is a neighborhood of Tirunelveli City in Tamil Nadu, India situated on the east bank of the Thamirabarani River. The neighborhood's name comes from its location west (Tamil: mela) of Palayamkottai.

topPlaces.name: Gopalasamudram
topPlaces.description: Gopalasamudram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Gopalasamudram is situated on the banks of the river Tamirabarani.

topPlaces.name: Kandithankulam
topPlaces.description: Kandithankulam is a village near Ponnagudi in Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are more than 100 houses in the village.

topPlaces.name: Pettai, Tirunelveli
topPlaces.description: Pettai is an industrial suburban area in Tirunelveli. It is approximately 6 kilometers of downtown Tirunelveli along the Southern Railway line to Tenkasi.

topPlaces.name: Nellaiappar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Nellaiappar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tirunelveli, a city in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Nellaiappar (also called Venuvananathar) represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Kanthimathi Amman.

topPlaces.name: Melacheval
topPlaces.description: Melacheval (also spelt Melaseval) is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: The Pachaiyar River originates on the eastern slopes of the Western Ghats approximately 1,000 metres (3,300 ft) above sea level in the state of Tamil Nadu in southern India. It then converges with the Tambaraparani River.

Mela Thiruvenkatanathapuram also known as Thirunankovil is a hamlet situated on the bank of river Thamirabarani. It is about 10 km from Tirunelveli, a district headquarters in Tamil Nadu, South India.

Melapalayam is a neighborhood of Tirunelveli City in Tamil Nadu, India situated on the east bank of the Thamirabarani River. The neighborhood's name comes from its location west (Tamil: mela) of Palayamkottai.
Gopalasamudram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Gopalasamudram is situated on the banks of the river Tamirabarani.
Kandithankulam is a village near Ponnagudi in Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are more than 100 houses in the village.
Pettai is an industrial suburban area in Tirunelveli. It is approximately 6 kilometers of downtown Tirunelveli along the Southern Railway line to Tenkasi.

The Nellaiappar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located in Tirunelveli, a city in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Nellaiappar (also called Venuvananathar) represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Kanthimathi Amman.
Melacheval (also spelt Melaseval) is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Varadharaja Perumal Kovil?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pachaiyar River, Mela Thiruvenkatanathapuram, Melapalayam, Gopalasamudram, Kandithankulam.
